basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Lecturer/ Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS)
basic_details.short_information: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) Lecturer/Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of BFUHS under Advertisement No. BFU-26/19. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the BFUHS Lecturer/Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years as on 01-01-2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per Punjab Govt. Rules. 10 years relaxation for in-service candidates. Additional relaxation for existing staff as per High Court order.

qualification.education_qualification: M. Sc (Audiology) / M. Sc (Speech Language Pathology) / MASLP / M. Sc (Speech and Hearing) or equivalent with 2 years teaching experience, 5 publications, RCI registration
qualification.details: Lecturer/Assistant Professor (Speech & Hearing): M. Sc (Audiology) / M. Sc (Speech Language Pathology) / MASLP / M. Sc (Speech and Hearing) degree from RCI recognized institution (after BASLP degree). Lecturer/Assistant Professor (Audiology): M.Sc. (Sp & Hg) / MASLP/ M.Sc. (Audiology) or its equivalent; 2 years teaching experience at PG/UG level; Minimum 5 publications with a cumulative impact factor of 5; Valid RCI registration. Lecturer/Assistant Professor (SLP): M.Sc. (Sp & Hg) / MASLP/ M.Sc. (Speech Language Pathology) or its equivalent; 2 years teaching experience at PG/UG level; Minimum 5 publications with a cumulative impact factor of 5; Valid RCI registration.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BFUHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BFUHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the BFUHS Lecturer/Assistant Professor posts is 29th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Lecturer/Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Lecturer/Assistant Professor positions at Baba Farid University of Health Sciences. These vacancies are distributed across different specializations within the Speech and Hearing department.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification includes an M. Sc degree in Audiology, Speech Language Pathology, MASLP, or Speech and Hearing from an RCI recognized institution. Specific experience and publications are also required for certain posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 40 years as of 1st January 2026. Age relaxation will be provided to eligible candidates as per Punjab Government rules and other applicable guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for BFUHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. General/OBC and PwBD candidates need to pay Rs. 2360/-, while SC/ST candidates are required to pay Rs. 1180/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Lecturer/Assistant Professor posts will involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates shortlisted based on their applications will be called for these stages.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Lecturer/Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be appointed at Pay Level-10. This indicates a competitive salary structure as per the government pay scales.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Punjab apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification specifies recruitment in Punjab. While it's generally open to all eligible candidates, it's advisable to check the official notification for any state-specific eligibility clauses.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any teaching experience required for the posts?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Lecturer/Assistant Professor (Audiology) and (SLP) posts, 2 years of teaching experience at the PG/UG level is mandatory. This experience is crucial for assessing the candidate's suitability.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to visit the official website of BFUHS for the most accurate and up-to-date information.
